display.purpose: Hero headers and large numeric timers.

mono.purpose: Strict aligned numeric fields and check-in statuses.

components.name: Card
components.description: Tactile elevated block container representing physical plates.
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); padding: 20px; transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out; } .ds-card-matte { background: #0E0E0E; } .ds-card-surface { background: #141414; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .ds-card-titanium { background: #1C1C1C; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Warm Alabaster primary click wrapper with 80ms active shrink behavior.
components.css: .ds-btn { width: 100%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 14px 24px; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.25em; font-weight: 700; transition: all 0.15s ease; user-select: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary { background: #E5E2D9; color: #080808; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #D5D2C9; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost bordered action wrapper for secondary controls.
components.css: .ds-btn { width: 100%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); padding: 14px 24px; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.25em; font-weight: 600; transition: all 0.15s ease; user-select: none; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; } .ds-btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary { color: #E5E2D9; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }

components.name: Status Indicator
components.description: Tag representing queue nodes and state changes.
components.css: .ds-indicator { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; } .ds-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-indicator-active { border-color: #C8A96B; background: #C8A96B; color: #080808; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(200, 169, 107, 0.15); } .ds-indicator-active .ds-dot { background: #080808; animation: ds-pulse 1.5s infinite; } .ds-indicator-success { border-color: #10B981; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); color: #10B981; } .ds-indicator-success .ds-dot { background: #10B981; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } }

narrative.overview:
The BarberBase design system models the visual feel of precision grooming tools—machined metal, tactile micro-textures, and high-contrast indicators. Designed to eliminate waiting area overcrowding, it serves barbershop owners, staff, and customers through frictionless, real-time queues. The UI evokes quality and functional speed, using structural surface elevation to prevent cognitive load.

It explicitly rejects generic, cluttered SaaS templates with irrelevant widgets and bright, overstimulating neon colors that cause astigmatism halation on mobile screens.
keyCharacteristics: Tactile Hardware Simulation: Simulated machined edges, tight transitions, and physical active scale-shrink responses.
Anti-Halation Surfaces: Zero pure black and zero pure white to protect against OLED smearing and visual fatigue.
Ergonomic Density: Focuses on queue states, wait-times, and status checkmarks clearly on a structured grid.

rules.name: The Gold Accent Rule
rules.body: Champagne Gold is used strictly for queue verification highlights and the active 'Your Turn' state. Its use must not exceed 5% of any screen surface to maintain its visual weight.

rules.name: The Tabular Alignment Rule
rules.body: All numbers, queue positions, and time stamps must use the monospace font stack (Space Mono) to ensure strict alignment across cards and tables.

rules.name: The Tonal Scaffolding Rule
rules.body: Depth is created using solid surface shifts: Canvas (#080808) -> Matte (#0E0E0E) -> Surface (#141414) -> Titanium (#1C1C1C).

dos: Do use bg-canvas for layout wrappers and let components stack above it using bg-matte or bg-surface.
Do align all active timer badges with the Champagne Gold accent to denote real-time responsiveness.
Do set custom scrollbars in long lists to keep a minimal 4px profile.
donts: Don't use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#ffffff) anywhere in the application.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text combined with gradients.
Don't add side-stripe accent borders greater than 1px on cards or alert components.
